title: Chapter 2
content:
Chapter 2: Chapter 2: Finally, My System Has Arrived!

[Ding]

[Initializing Lust Harem System]

[Connecting the Lust Harem System to the host’s Soul]

[Connecting process at 80%...]

[90%...]

[99%...]

[Connection completed]

[Welcome to the Lust Harem System, Host. Do you wish to begin your path towards eternal glory?]

’Finally, my system has arrived! All I need now are my memories!’ He celebrated inwardly.’

After all the prior frustration, he had at last received what he had been yearning for.

"Yes!" he replied without hesitation.

[Name: Damon Arcknight]

[Age: 18]

[Cultivation: Mortal] [Can advance with lust point]

[Affinities: N/A] [Can be upgraded in the lust store]

[Spiritual Roots: N/A] [New roots can be bought in the lust store]

[Bloodline: Blood of Incubus Lord] [Mortal Grade - Low] [Can be upgraded with lust point]

[Physique: Body of Incubus Lord] [Mortal Grade - Low] [Can be upgraded with lust point]

[Lust points: 1000]

[Harem Members: N/A]

[Ability: Incubus Touch, Incubus Aura]

[As a starting bonus, the System will provide the host with 1000 lust points]

[The Lust Harem System has been successfully installed]

The further he read, the more promising it became, an unusual gleam flickering in his eyes.

’Incubus, huh...’

’System... what exactly are lust points?’ he called out within his mind,

A feminine, mechanical voice resonated through his mind in response.

[Lust Points are the system’s primary currency. They may be spent on cultivation and purchases within the lust store.]

’Hmm... and how do I get them?’

[Lust Points are obtainable through various means, including lewd and intimate acts with women. The volume of points rewarded differs according to the power, standing, and beauty of the woman in question.]

"Hm..." Damon considered this for a moment.

Truly a remarkable system.

’And my abilities?’

[Incubus Touch will make your touch send any woman into heat, leaving her desperate for more touch. The effect grows stronger the longer you remain in her company.]

[Incubus Aura will make your presence draw women to you with ease. The effect deepens the more time you spend together.]

He looked over his absurdly formidable abilities, [Incubus Touch] and [Incubus Aura], already envisioning the many ways he could bend women to his will and accumulate his strength.

’Hahaha, with these abilities, no woman is beyond my reach. This is practically a game set to easy mode.’

’Truck-kun, my old friend! I meant every word when I told you to run me down! Hahaha!’

****

After having his joyful moment, Damon immediately used his bonus point.

"System, how many points are needed to advance my cultivation?" Damon asked, while looking at the lust point.

[For the Elementary Spirit Realm, 10 lust points are needed to advance, and the cost will be doubled for each level.]

"Hmm... Do it then, for now make me advance to the Elementary Spirit Realm - Seventh Level, it should be enough for me to be called a genius among my age."

’Based on the memories, an average cultivator at eighteen years old is around the fourth to Fifth Level of the Elementary Spirit Realm.’

[Host, you need to have Spiritual Roots first before you can start cultivation; it will make you stronger in the long run.]

"Got it." He said it calmly enough, though inwardly he clicked his tongue.

’Fuck, this previous owner of the body doesn’t have any deep details about cultivation; he only knows the common knowledge that he heard from people chatting.’

"System, what exactly is a Spiritual Root?" Damon asked.

[Spiritual Roots are channels within the body that enable cultivation. They govern a person’s talent and elemental affinities. The higher the grade, the greater their capacity to absorb spiritual energy — what most people refer to as talent.]

"Then what about affinities?" Damon asked.

[Affinities describe a cultivator’s compatibility with forms of qi — elemental, weapon-based, or trait-based. The stronger the affinity, the more naturally one takes to abilities tied to that qi.]

"So, if my fire affinity reached 100, I’d be immune to fire?"

[Correct. Exceed that threshold, and fire becomes a source of nourishment rather than harm.]

"Alright, I got it now." Damon opened the lust store

[Lust store]

[Lust points: 1000]

<Cultivation resources>

<Cultivation/combat techniques>

<Weapons and armor>

<Recovery pills>

<Spiritual materials>

<Lust items>

<Spiritual Roots>

<Talismans>

<Bloodlines and constitutions>

<Miscellaneous>

Then he picked the spirit roots section, only to be met with an endless list of options.

’How am I supposed to know which of these is worth taking?’

"System, any recommendation with my current point?" Damon asked, scrolling through the lust store.

[The system recommends the host pick Elemental Spiritual Roots.]

"Hmm... Alright, bought it."

[- 500 Lust Point]

Then he felt something bloom inside his body. Then his perspective changed, and now he can feel the spiritual energy in the air.

’So, this is spiritual energy.’

"Use the rest of the point to advance my cultivation."

[You have become a cultivator! Entering the First Level of the Elementary Spirit Realm. -10 lust points.]

Damon feels the spiritual energy surging into his body, and he feels his body getting stronger. But it doesn’t end there...

[Cultivation increased! First Level of the Elementary Spirit Realm → Second Level of the Elementary Spirit Realm. -20 lust points.]

[Cultivation increased! Second Level of the Elementary Spirit Realm → Third Level of the Elementary Spirit Realm. -40 lust points.]

[Cultivation increased! Third Level of the Elementary Spirit Realm → Fourth Level of the Elementary Spirit Realm. -80 lust points.]

[Cultivation increased! Fourth Level of the Elementary Spirit Realm → Fifth Level of the Elementary Spirit Realm. -160 lust points.]

Now Damon can feel power running through his body as he reaches the Fifth Level of the Elementary Spirit Realm.

[Name: Damon Arcknight]

[Age: 18]

[Cultivation: Elementary Spirit Realm - Fifth Level] [Can advance with lust point]

[Affinities: Fire: 0, Water: 0, Ice: 0, Wind: 0, Lightning: 0, Earth: 0, Nature: 0, Light: 0, Dark: 0] [Can be upgraded with the lust point]

[Spiritual Roots: Elemental Spiritual Roots] [Mortal Grade - Low] [Can be upgraded with the lust point, and new roots can be bought in the lust store]

[Bloodline: Blood of Incubus Lord] [Mortal Grade - Low] [Can be upgraded with lust point]

[Physique: Body of Incubus Lord] [Mortal Grade - Low] [Can be upgraded with lust point]

[Lust points: 190]

[Harem Members: N/A]

[Ability: Incubus Touch, Incubus Aura]

Looking at his status, Damon smiled and spoke.

"Now, I’m ready."
